Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
The Pavilion at Montage Mountain
Scranton, PA
Previous Names:
Ford Pavilion at Montage Mountain (Changed after 2005)
Toyota Pavilion at Montage Mountain (Changed after 2013)
Seating Capacity: 17500
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 7
  DMB  (7)

Longest Performance:
07.14.10 - #41 (21:13)

Song Liberations
  5.28.12 – Help Myself (after 1368 days)
  5.29.13 – Hunger for the Great Light (after 2076 days)
Venue Picture
Description
The Toyota Pavilion at Montage Mountain opened in 1999 as the Montage Mountain Amphitheater. It changed its name to the Ford Pavilion at Montage Mountain in 2002 before adopting its current name in 2006.

DMB's first show here, in 2005, was the venue's first sell-out show.

1000 Montage Mountain Rd.
Scranton, PA 18505
